ab: ’inavayan! cacima’ u da eman?
en: A: Hello, what do you want to buy?

ab: cacima’ ku da saya tiaw.
en: B: I want to buy a cup.

ab: ’inavayan! aeman nu cacima’an?
en: A: Hello, what do you want to buy?

ab: cacima’ ku da saya talupung.
en: B: I want to buy a hat.

ab: cacima’ ku da tiaw, ulra mu inaniwan?
ch: B+:我要買杯子，你們有賣嗎?
en: B: I want to buy a cup, do you sell them?

ab: ulra, cacima’ u pidaya?
en: A: Yes, how many do you want to buy?

ab: menaniwan mu da puran?
en: B: Do you sell betel nut?

ab: uniyan, adi mi menaniwan da puran.
en: A: No, we don't sell betel nut.

ab: cacima’ ku da veras.
en: B: I want to buy rice.

ab: pidaya cavu nanu cacima’an?
en: A: How many packs do you want to buy?

ab: ’aylra da telu cavu.
en: B: Give me a three pack.

ab: cacima’ ku da vurasi.
en: B: I want to buy sweet potatoes.

ab: irayan! muniwan lra peniya.
en: A: I'm sorry! All the sweet potatoes are sold out.

ab: cacima’ ku da lrawlraw a duwaya dalilran.
en: B: I want to buy two bottles of oil.

ab: ulra diya saya dalilr na musama’.
en: B: We only have one bottle left.

ab: uwa pulralrangay ku cimima’ da vucinun.
en: A: Go buy me eggs.

ab: cacima’ u pidaya tingting?
en: B: How many pounds do you want to buy?

ab: cacima’ u pidaya tingting na vucinun?
en: A: How many pounds of eggs do you want to buy?

ab: cacima’ ku duwaya tingting.
en: B: I want to buy two catties.

ab: cacima’ ku da kenaw, a duwaya vutu’.
en: A: I want to buy two green onions.

ab: ulra diya sama’ a telu vutu’, ku verayay u peniya.
ch: B:這裡剩三把，我全給你啦!
en: B: There are three left, I'll give them all to you!

ab: pidaya paysu ini na sacavu veras?
en: A: How much is this bag of rice?

ab: sacavu duwaya leman paysu.
en: B: $200 for a pack.

ab: peniya mu, makaveca’an di saya paysu, ’aylra makaveca’an paysu maruwa lra.
ch: A:總共21元，給我20元就可以了。
en: A:The total is $21, just give me $20.

ab: lrayuwan!
en: B: Thank you.

ab: makaiwan di lruwaca paysu i kani.
en: A: Here's $95.

ab: puwapuwa ku diya, cimima’, parepauwa da saleman paysu.
en: B: I'll buy some more, and make up 100 yuan.

ab: lruwaca leman di mukecep paysu peniya.
en: A:All $510.

ab: kaduruyu diya! karuwa lruwaca leman paysu ay?
en: B: It's a bit cheaper! Can I have 500?

ab: padangal dadu ini a, karuwa diya kemaduru?
ch: A:這個太貴了，可以算便宜一點嗎?
en: A: It's too expensive, can you make it cheaper?

ab: adi, maduru lra dadu ini a.
ch: B:不行，這個已經很便宜了。
en: B: No, this is already very cheap.

ab: ’aylra kanini na walru nu kemadu!
en: A: Then give me this packet of candy!

ab: makatelun paysu ini na walru, ulra diya duma cacima’an?
ch: B:這餅乾30元，還需要買別的東西嗎?
en: B: This cookie is $30, do you need to buy anything else?

ab: uniyan lra. lrayuwan!
en: No, thank you!
